calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-11-2011 Continued To May-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Quynh Tran for Richard Domich (Executor/Personal Representative).

The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to May 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Tran to provide supplemental information regarding the income taxes paid, tax preparation fees and filing fees. The Court advised Counsel that the Attorney is entitled to statutory fees and extraordinary fees, and that the Court could not award Executor's fees to the Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
